description: A reporter is writing an article on a popular topic and needs to ensure it is optimized to rank well in search engine results.

nodes.task_description: Use an SEO tool to research the most common keywords and phrases people use when searching for this topic.

expected_outcome.value: A list of target keywords is generated.

nodes.task_description: Incorporate the target keywords naturally into the article's headline, subheadings, and body text.

expected_outcome.value: The article is optimized for the target keywords.

nodes.task_description: Write a compelling meta description that includes the primary keyword and will entice users to click from a search results page.

expected_outcome.value: An effective meta description is drafted.
